abilities.name: Absolute Zero
abilities.text: After an enemy model resolves a (missile) action targeting this model, this model may drain a (soulstone) to end the attacker's activation.

abilities.name: Creeping Ice
abilities.text: Enemy models in base contact with a friendly Ice Pillar marker within 6" may only move with the Walk action, or from an effect controlled by this crew.

actions.name: Freezing Strikes
actions.costs_and_restrictions: When this action is declared, choose if it has a range of "(melee)1" or "(melee)6".

triggers.name: Stumble
triggers.text: When resolving, if the target has a Staggered token, deal +1 damage to it. Otherwise, it gains a Staggered token.

triggers.name: Convulsions
triggers.text: Move the target up to 3". Then, the target must either discard a card or this model may move it up to 3".

actions.name: Entomb in Ice
actions.effects: Make an Ice Pillar marker within 1" of the target. This model may drain a (c). If it does so, make up to two additional markers within 3" of the first.

triggers.name: Harsh Winter
triggers.text: Enemy models within (aura)1" of any of the made markers gain Staggered and Hunger tokens.

triggers.name: My Loyal Servant
triggers.text: Another friendly model within 3" of the target heals 1.

actions.name: Form From Ice
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per turn. Target a friendly Ice Pillar marker completely on the enemy table half.
actions.effects: Summon an allied minion in base contact with the target, then remove the target.
